OK. We don't have to match clang's IR exactly — just produce semantically equivalent. So I can:
- For arrays with constant init: just generate a loop of stores (or memset+stores). Simpler to just emit individual stores.
- Or for performance, emit a global "constant" with memcpy. For correctness/simplicity, individual stores work too.
